_doc: Embedded tactical visuals for Groq Whisper Transcription in 50 Lines. {palette} resolves at runtime.

embedded-1.notes: Part 1 lead visual. Groq vs OpenAI Whisper Comparison Table. 5 rows by 3 columns.
embedded-1.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference table comparing Groq Whisper and OpenAI Whisper across 5 dimensions. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names, no typography labels, no instructions inside the image.
3. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Groq vs OpenAI Whisper"
SUBTITLE: "Same model weights, different inference stack. The five dimensions that matter."

COMPOSITION: a three-column table with 5 data rows plus a header row.

HEADER ROW (cyan pills, uppercase): "DIMENSION", "GROQ WHISPER", "OPENAI WHISPER"

ROW 1:
Dimension: "Speed"
Groq: "~250x realtime"
OpenAI: "~5 to 10x realtime"

ROW 2:
Dimension: "Price per audio hour"
Groq: "$0.04"
OpenAI: "$0.36"

ROW 3:
Dimension: "Models available"
Groq: "whisper-large-v3-turbo"
OpenAI: "whisper-1, whisper-large-v3"

ROW 4:
Dimension: "Streaming endpoint"
Groq: "Not yet"
OpenAI: "Yes (managed)"

ROW 5:
Dimension: "Built-in diarization"
Groq: "No"
OpenAI: "No (use realtime API)"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Header row pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Dimension column (column 1): bold sans-serif, off-white
- Groq column (column 2): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, larger size for the standout values (Speed and Price); cells where Groq wins clearly have a subtle bright cyan glow around the cell outline
- OpenAI column (column 3): condensed mono-spaced, off-white at 90% opacity

ROW STYLING:
- Rows 1 and 2 (Speed and Price, where Groq wins by a large margin) have a subtle bright cyan glow around the row outline, telegraphing the headline finding.
- Alternating row backgrounds: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines, alternating subtle indigo intensity.

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no realistic icons.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No realistic Groq or OpenAI logos.
- No microphone or headphone illustrations.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference table.

embedded-2.notes: Part 2 visual. The 50-Line Service Architecture. Pure data flow diagram from folder read to disk write.
embedded-2.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference architecture diagram showing the data flow of the 50-line Node service. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.
4. NO actual code text, NO JavaScript syntax, NO function bodies anywhere in the image. The diagram is pure architecture, not code.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 50-Line Service Architecture"
SUBTITLE: "Read folder. Loop files. Post to Groq. Write transcripts. That is the whole shape."

COMPOSITION: a horizontal left-to-right data flow diagram with 4 main stages. Each stage is a rounded rectangle box. Thin bright cyan #06B6D4 arrow lines flow between the stages.

STAGE 1 (far left, dark indigo box with bright cyan thick outline):
Label pill at top: "STAGE 1"
Main text inside box: "fs.readdirSync()"
Sub-text: "Filter to .m4a, .mp3, .wav, .flac, .ogg, .webm"
Below the box: a small visual representing a folder, rendered as a stylized rectangle with a small folder-tab notch on top, thin off-white outline, no folder clip-art.

STAGE 2 (left of center, dark indigo box with bright cyan thick outline):
Label pill at top: "STAGE 2"
Main text inside box: "for ... of files"
Sub-text: "Sequential loop, one file at a time"
Below the box: a small visual representing a loop, rendered as a thin bright cyan circular arrow path, no clip-art.

STAGE 3 (right of center, dark indigo box with bright cyan thick outline):
Label pill at top: "STAGE 3"
Main text inside box: "axios.post(GROQ_URL)"
Sub-text: "multipart/form-data, Authorization: Bearer"
Below the box: a small visual representing the Groq endpoint, rendered as a stylized cloud or server shape with thin off-white outline and a small bright cyan dot inside, no realistic cloud clip-art.

STAGE 4 (far right, dark indigo box with bright cyan thick outline):
Label pill at top: "STAGE 4"
Main text inside box: "fs.writeFileSync()"
Sub-text: "transcripts/<base>.txt + transcripts/<base>.json"
Below the box: a small visual representing a transcripts folder with two files inside, rendered as a stylized rectangle with two horizontal off-white bars inside (representing the .txt and .json outputs), no clip-art.

ARROWS:
- Between each pair of stages, a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 horizontal arrow with a small arrowhead pointing right. Soft cyan glow at arrowheads.

ABOVE THE FLOW (centered horizontal label strip): three small data-shape pills indicating what is flowing between stages:
- Between STAGE 1 and STAGE 2: a small cyan pill labeled "file paths[]"
- Between STAGE 2 and STAGE 3: a small cyan pill labeled "ReadStream"
- Between STAGE 3 and STAGE 4: a small cyan pill labeled "verbose_json"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Stage label pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase
- Stage main text: bold mono-spaced, off-white (the function calls render as if they were code identifiers)
- Stage sub-text: italic medium sans-serif, off-white at 75%
- Data-shape pills above arrows: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan on dark indigo, smaller size

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no realistic folder clip art, no realistic cloud images, no realistic file icons, no Node.js logo, no Groq logo).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No actual code blocks, no JavaScript syntax, no function bodies.
- No realistic terminal or IDE mockups.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference architecture diagram.

embedded-3.notes: Part 4 visual. Format Handling Chart. 4 columns (m4a/mp3/wav/mp4) by 3 rows (Direct? / Pre-process? / Max Size).
embedded-3.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference chart showing format handling rules for Groq Whisper across 4 audio and video formats. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Format Handling for Groq Whisper"
SUBTITLE: "What goes direct, what needs ffmpeg, where the size ceiling lands."

COMPOSITION: a four-column chart with 3 data rows plus a header row. Each column represents one file format.

HEADER ROW (cyan pills, uppercase): "PROPERTY", "M4A", "MP3", "WAV", "MP4"

Wait, correction: 5 columns total because the property column is the first column.

FINAL COLUMN STRUCTURE: 5 columns (Property, m4a, mp3, wav, mp4) by 3 data rows plus a header row.

HEADER ROW (cyan pills, uppercase, 5 cells): "PROPERTY", "M4A", "MP3", "WAV", "MP4"

ROW 1:
Property: "Direct upload?"
M4A: "YES" (bright cyan, with small filled circle indicator)
MP3: "YES" (bright cyan, with small filled circle indicator)
WAV: "YES" (bright cyan, with small filled circle indicator)
MP4: "NO" (purple #7C3AED, with small empty circle indicator)

ROW 2:
Property: "Pre-process step?"
M4A: "None"
MP3: "None"
WAV: "None"
MP4: "ffmpeg -vn -acodec libmp3lame"

ROW 3:
Property: "Max duration at 25MB"
M4A: "~12 min @ 256kbps"
MP3: "~25 min @ 128kbps"
WAV: "~2-3 min uncompressed"
MP4: "Convert first, then chunk"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Header row pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Property column (column 1): bold sans-serif, off-white
- M4A, MP3, WAV value columns: medium sans-serif, off-white; YES values in bright cyan, NO values in purple
- MP4 value column: medium sans-serif, off-white at 90%; the ffmpeg command in mono-spaced face
- The MP4 column has a subtle purple #7C3AED tint to the column outline, telegraphing 'this is the special-case column'
- The M4A, MP3, WAV columns have a subtle bright cyan tint to the column outlines, telegraphing 'these go direct'

ROW STYLING:
- Alternating row backgrounds: rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines, alternating subtle indigo intensity.

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic file icons (no .mp3 icon clip art, no .mp4 icon clip art).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No realistic ffmpeg or terminal mockups.
- No realistic audio software icons.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference chart.

embedded-4.notes: Part 6 visual. Three Use Cases Mini-Map. 3 horizontal pipeline flows stacked vertically.
embedded-4.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference diagram showing 3 real pipelines built on top of the Groq Whisper service. Aspect 5:4.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Three Real Pipelines"
SUBTITLE: "Same 50-line base. Three different end states."

COMPOSITION: 3 horizontal pipeline flows stacked vertically. Each flow is a left-to-right sequence of 3 stages connected by thin bright cyan #06B6D4 arrows. Each flow has a small label pill on the far left identifying the pipeline.

FLOW 1 (top row):
Left label pill: "PIPELINE 1"
Stage 1 (dark indigo rounded box with bright cyan outline): "Podcast .mp3 (60 min)"
Arrow with small cyan glow.
Stage 2 (dark indigo rounded box with bright cyan outline): "Groq Whisper (90s)"
Arrow with small cyan glow.
Stage 3 (off-white rounded card with slate text): "Show notes + chapter markers"
Far right outcome pill, uppercase, condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan: "$0.12 PER EPISODE"

FLOW 2 (middle row):
Left label pill: "PIPELINE 2"
Stage 1 (dark indigo rounded box with bright cyan outline): "Meeting recording"
Arrow with small cyan glow.
Stage 2 (dark indigo rounded box with bright cyan outline): "Transcribe + LLM extract"
Arrow with small cyan glow.
Stage 3 (off-white rounded card with slate text): "Action items + decisions"
Far right outcome pill, uppercase, condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan: "$0.09 PER MEETING"

FLOW 3 (bottom row):
Left label pill: "PIPELINE 3"
Stage 1 (dark indigo rounded box with bright cyan outline): "Course .mp4 library (40 hr)"
Arrow with small cyan glow.
Stage 2 (dark indigo rounded box with bright cyan outline): "Chunk + transcribe + index"
Arrow with small cyan glow.
Stage 3 (off-white rounded card with slate text): "Postgres full-text search"
Far right outcome pill, uppercase, condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan: "$1.60 ONE-TIME"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Pipeline label pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase
- Stage 1 and Stage 2 boxes (dark indigo): main text in bold sans-serif, off-white
- Stage 3 boxes (off-white cards): main text in medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B
- Outcome pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan, uppercase

ROW SPACING: even vertical spacing between the 3 flows, with thin off-white horizontal divider lines at very low opacity between rows.

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons (no microphone clip art, no Notion logo, no Postgres elephant logo, no realistic course platform icons).
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No realistic terminal or IDE mockups.
- No realistic podcast app icons.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference diagram.
